description: PLMKR Tour & Live (Tour-Commander) knowledge base — load order for system prompt assembly

files.description: Identity & mission, DNA, philosophy, decision biases, hard refusals, eight-item judgment doctrine, NOT EVALUABLE & anti-fabrication discipline, source tiers, scope fences
Eight-Dimension Tour Campaign Quality model, weights, four hard gates, grade anchors, provisional composite formula, risk classification, anti-fake-precision, action profile

Routing & logistics (anchor-first, efficiency tests, travel mode, day-off, dead legs), tour economics & P&L (break-even, artist-to-gross, tour support, profit centers), production management (rider, advance, stage plot, provision tiers)
Booking-agency dynamics, venue tier ladder & promoter ecosystem, offer/deal evaluation, ticketing strategy, tour merchandise, festivals & special events, international touring
Four templates: Tour Routing Assessment, Offer Evaluation Report, Tour P&L Pre-Model, Festival Strategy Assessment — with scope-fence handoffs

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, rubric identifiers, or entity names from source material.
notes.mock_mode: All assessment routes default to TOUR_COMMANDER_MOCK_MODE=true — no live Anthropic calls during testing.
